prompt: Order these transport milestones from earliest to latest

events.title: Invention of the wheel
events.fact: 3500 BC — Sumerian wheels used for pottery and carts

events.title: First steam locomotive
events.fact: 1804 — Richard Trevithick's engine runs in Wales

events.title: Benz Patent-Motorwagen
events.fact: 1886 — widely regarded as first modern automobile

events.title: Shinkansen bullet train
events.fact: 1964 — high-speed rail line opens in Tokyo, Japan

events.title: Tesla Roadster released
events.fact: 2008 — first highway legal production all-electric car
